rationale: Both reviews surface exactly the same two real documentation defects in the shown diff (includeRight docstring overclaims [HopfAlgebra k A] vs. only [Algebra k A] at def includeRight; public @[simp] includeRight_apply lacks any docstring), and the suggested fixes are equivalent in effect and materiality; Review 1's parenthetical note on possibly dropping the lemma does not change the outcome since it is not required and the PRs would be equally improved either way.
